title: Sprint 1 planning kickoff
description: Full team sprint planning session. Defined initial backlog and sprint cadence.

title: Team onboarding complete
description: All team members have access to repositories, environments, and communication channels.

title: Architecture decision on database
description: Selected PostgreSQL over MongoDB based on query patterns and team expertise.

title: Design review meeting
description: Reviewed onboarding flow mockups. Reduced from 5 screens to 3 with progressive disclosure.

title: Onboarding designs approved
description: 3-screen onboarding flow approved with progressive disclosure approach.

title: Infrastructure planning
description: Mapped out CI/CD pipeline and environment promotion strategy.

title: Onboarding screens complete
description: James delivered final onboarding screen designs ahead of schedule.

title: CI/CD pipeline deployed
description: GitHub Actions pipeline live for dev, staging, and production environments with automated rollback.

title: Bug triage session
description: Reviewed 12 open bugs. Auth bugs prioritized P0, mobile layout P1.

title: Design copy finalized
description: James completed onboarding copy — all text content reviewed and approved.

title: First beta user added
description: Lisa Nguyen onboarded as first external beta tester.

title: Scope negotiation
description: Adjusted beta scope. Deferred advanced reporting, team collaboration, and calendar integration to v1.1.

title: Beta feedback form launched
description: Sarah created and distributed beta feedback form to all testers.

title: Security audit completed
description: External penetration test completed. No critical vulnerabilities found. Two medium-severity issues flagged.

title: Beta feedback debrief
description: Reviewed aggregated beta feedback. Positive onboarding ratings but mobile layout issues reported.

title: Onboarding survey results
description: Survey results compiled: 8/10 beta users rated onboarding 4+ out of 5. Small sample size noted.

title: Scope boundary finalized
description: v1 feature boundary formally documented. All beta feedback categorized as v1 must-have or v1.1 nice-to-have.

title: Auth bug discovered
description: Critical auth flow bug identified: OAuth token refresh fails on non-standard error responses. Launch timeline risk escalated.

title: Auth bug post-mortem
description: Root cause analysis of token refresh failure. 3 critical edge cases identified. Decision: no launch until resolved.

title: Auth provider outage
description: Third-party auth provider experienced outage. New risk logged for provider reliability. Fallback auth mechanism proposed.

title: Load test baseline established
description: Initial load test results documented: API handles 500 concurrent users at p95 < 200ms. 1000-user test pending.

title: Database optimization started
description: Maria began index optimization work to improve query performance ahead of load testing.

title: Stakeholder update
description: Progress report: 4/15 actions complete, 3 blocked. Auth blockers may push launch by 1 week.

title: Launch checklist review
description: Reviewed 15-item launch checklist. Auth flow and SSL certificates blocking. Launch date formally at risk.

title: Launch date at risk
description: Launch date formally flagged as at-risk. Team to reassess on April 15 after auth blocker resolution attempt.

title: Onboarding design partner email
description: Email thread with Stripe Design Partners: Priya sends written critique, Ben confirms 3-screen direction, James picks up the CTA + persistent progress indicator changes.

title: #backend Slack: OAuth token refresh debugging
description: Slack thread between Ben and Maria debugging the OAuth token refresh issue ahead of the formal bug triage. Agreement to escalate with the provider.

title: Weekly written update to Lisa
description: Ben's weekly update to external stakeholder Lisa covering actions, blockers, and the pending launch-date reassessment. Lisa confirms she'll share with the beta cohort.

title: #devops Slack: deploy readiness check
description: Tom proposes flipping the staging-to-prod auto-promote toggle. Maria holds for the pending 1k-user load test; Alex confirms frontend is green.
